networks.name: Rakuten Advertising / LinkShare
networks.notes: Primary US network; mid=43469 confirmed active. GET STARTED button live on program page.

networks.name: Impact.com
networks.notes: Second US network confirmed active on program page.

networks.name: Webgains
networks.notes: Anker Nordics; 8–15% tiered by product type and volume; 30-day cookie.

networks.name: CueLinks
networks.notes: India/International; 4.5% payout as of last confirmed data.

networks.name: Indoleads
networks.notes: CPA network; Southeast Asia affiliate reach.

commission.type: flat (US/UK/EU); tiered by product type and volume (Nordics)
commission.notes: 8% flat on all US transactions confirmed unchanged. Nordic ceiling 15% unchanged. SOLIX sub-brand separate at 5%.

creative_assets.notes: Regularly updated banners and text links confirmed. Dedicated affiliate manager available. Data feed supports programmatic/AI-assisted placements. No new creative formats detected this cycle.

affiliate_program.payment_terms: Standard network payment terms via Rakuten Advertising / Impact.com; no minimum threshold explicitly stated on program page.
restrictions: No simulated purchase patterns or scripts

anker_solix.notes: Separate program for energy/power station sub-brand. 5% on $200–$3,000+ AOV products. Strong EPC despite lower rate.

ankerwork.notes: Workplace/B2B accessories sub-brand. Commission rate UNCONFIRMED — now 7 CONSECUTIVE AUDIT CYCLES without resolution. CRITICAL: direct escalation via affiliate@anker.com is overdue.

anker_referral_program.notes: Consumer-facing referral (10% to referrer, 10% discount to referee). Higher incentive but consumer-only scope.

superchargers_creator_program.notes: Content creator/influencer bridge. High-quality content may convert to traditional affiliate program placement. Key influencer-to-affiliate recruitment pipeline.

vs_benchmark.commission: above_median — 8% vs 5% category median; upper-mid band vs 12% high
vs_benchmark.network_coverage: strong — 5 networks confirmed (Rakuten, Impact, Webgains, CueLinks, Indoleads)

afare_signals.commission_note: 8% well above 5% category median. Nordic ceiling 15% is elite tier for the region.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 30 days at category median. Competitive but not class-leading vs brands offering 45–60 day windows.
strengths: 8% flat rate well above 5% category median — strong EPC signal for affiliates
5-network presence (Rakuten + Impact + Webgains + CueLinks + Indoleads) — broadest coverage in category peer group
Dedicated affiliate manager reduces activation friction
Self-serve creative library (banners, data feeds, custom links) enables rapid deployment
Seasonal coupons and promotions provide content hooks for deal publishers
SuperChargers creator program bridges social media influencers into affiliate pipeline
2% stated conversion rate above typical CE floor; strong brand trust reduces pre-sale objections
Peak season NOW OPEN: outdoor charging, power banks, and travel accessories through Memorial Day
weaknesses: SOLIX sub-brand at 5% creates rate discrepancy vs main Anker 8% — risk of publisher confusion
AnkerWork commission rate UNCONFIRMED for SEVEN consecutive audit cycles — critical gap in program intelligence
CueLinks international rate (4.5%) significantly below US rate — geographic rate fragmentation
No publicly stated payment schedule or minimum payout threshold
30-day cookie at median — competitors with 45–60 day windows hold structural advantage on high-consideration purchases
opportunities: Peak outdoor/travel season is LIVE through Memorial Day — affiliates should be actively running power bank and travel charger content now
SOLIX high-AOV ($200–$3K) yields strong EPC even at 5%; warrants dedicated affiliate content brief
Nordic tiered model (up to 15%) could serve as template for a US volume-tier upgrade pitch to Anker affiliate team
Data feed availability supports programmatic and AI shopping agent-mediated affiliate placements
Indoleads SEA presence opens Southeast Asian affiliate market — high growth potential
Consumer referral program (10%) signals brand willingness to invest in incentive structures
threats: Amazon Associates default channel captures most casual Anker buyer traffic ahead of affiliate links
UGREEN (8–15%) and RAVPower (8–20%) offer comparable or higher ceiling commission rates
Multiple sub-brand programs without unified messaging risk fragmenting publisher attention
Flat US rate with no volume tier may not retain top-tier publishers vs higher-ceiling alternatives

changes_since_last_audit.changes_detected: None. All program terms stable — 8% commission, 30-day cookie, 5-network footprint, creative asset types unchanged.
notable_observations: AnkerWork unconfirmed commission rate now at SEVEN consecutive audit cycles — escalation is critical and overdue
Peak outdoor/travel affiliate season is live; Memorial Day content window opens now
Rakuten and Impact.com dual signup buttons confirmed live on program page
Nordic tiered rate (8–15% via Webgains) remains highest confirmed Anker ceiling globally
No new seasonal promotions or creative formats detected; existing asset library unchanged

benchmark_update: none — consumer_electronics category benchmarks remain valid. No new category-level data found this cycle warranting update to category-benchmarks.json.
recommended_actions: CRITICAL: Email affiliate@anker.com NOW to resolve AnkerWork commission rate — 7 consecutive cycles unresolved, no further deferral acceptable
Activate peak season affiliate content calendar for power banks, outdoor charging, travel chargers through Memorial Day weekend
Brief high-AOV SOLIX partners on 5% program with EPC framing to differentiate from main Anker program confusion
Evaluate pitch to Anker affiliate team: US volume-tier model based on Nordics tiered structure (8–15%) to capture top-tier publishers
Cross-reference with Mac Bee ACES signal data for full Flywheel composite score update on Anker
